dialogos.texto_en: Hmm, I see. That's valuable information.\nThank you, Raiha-chan.
I was curious about it too\nand was keeping an eye on it.
(Information? Keeping an eye on it?\n I don't understand the details,\n but I have a bad feeling about it.)
Hey, what are you guys talking about?
Alright, next, please tell me the details of last night.\nWhat were Uesugi-kun and Ichika doing\nafter the lights went out%p-2;――
Hey, what are you talking about?!
U-Uesugi-kun?!\nDid you catch us?
Hey, Itsuki?\nWhat were you talking about?
...It's an investigation into your behavior,\nUesugi-kun.
Don't ask Raiha that sort of thing!
It's okay, don't worry, big bro.\nI just conveyed the facts.\nThat nothing happened.
*sigh*\nDo people not trust me that much?\nIt's a bit depressing.
N-no! It's not like that!
I trust you, Uesugi-kun,\nand think you're a reliable person.
However, um...\nI'm more worried about Ichika, to be honest.
Huh?
Well, she's the most mature and adult-like among us,\nso...
And?
P-please don't make me say more than this!
You were the one trying to say something though...
Anyway, Uesugi-kun.\nThere's something I wanted to ask you\nwhile we're at it.
What is it?
You're planning to move to Tokyo\nright after this graduation trip, right?\nWhat are your plans after that?
After that?
For example, how often do you plan\nto come back to your hometown?
I don't know.\nIt depends on how busy I am with university.
Then...have you thought about what kind of room\nyou want to live in?
What kind?\nWell, a typical one-person apartment%p-2;――
I mean, it'll be a one-person apartment\nthat fits my economic situation.\nIt might be quite different from your idea.
I see...
So, what kind of lifestyle\nare you planning to have in your new life?
Lifestyle? It depends on my situation in university.\nI won't know until I start.
R-right!
U-um, well, what kind of bed\ndo you plan on having in your room?!
What's the point of asking something like that?
...I don't know, what's the point indeed?
Repeating the same question won't help me answer yours.
Then, are you planning to work in Tokyo\nafter graduation?
I don't know that either.\nIt depends on what kind of job I get.
Oooohh...\nIt seems like you don't know anything.\nWhat do you know, then?
I'd like to help you but I can't...
What are you trying to say, exactly?\nI don't know what you're asking, so I can't answer.
But that's obvious, isn't it?\nWhat I want to know is%p-2;――
AAH?!\nN-no what I want to say is, ummmm!
What is it?
I-I wonder?
Don't ask me.
I tried to ask a lot of things,\nbut it didn't go well at all...\nI thought I could be of help to Ichika...!
Itsuki? What's wrong?
Is it that you're worried about your future?
Eh? Why do you ask?
You asked about my future vision,\nbecause you're anxious about your own future, right?
Oh, that's what you meant.
It's difficult for me to answer questions about myself,\nbut I'll be happy to help you with your concerns.
You don't have to ask in such a roundabout way,\nas your guys' tutor I'll help you%p-2;――
No, it's not anything like that.
Is that so? Then what is it?
U-um, well...
I tried to ask a lot of things,\nbut it didn't go well at all...\nI thought I could be of help to Ichika...!
Itsuki? What's wrong?
I plan to focus on my university life first,\nbecause there are so many uncertainties \nregarding the future.
Ah...
After I study what I need to study,\nI will figure out what job will suit me.
That's what I thought...
Anyway, that's my answer to your question\nabout my job hunting plan.\nIs that enough?
Yes, you answered my question perfectly.
Uesugi-kun,\nI didn't know you were thinking about your future\nthis much.
Obviously.\nI'm not going to university on a whim.
I tried to ask a lot of things,\nbut it didn't go well at all...\nI thought I could be of help to Ichika...!
Itsuki? What's wrong?
Raiha-chan! Let's go swimming!
Huh?
Wha?\nWe can go swim,\nbut didn't you want to go ask big bro some stuff?
It's fine.\nWhat I need to do right now\nis cool my head with seawater.
Right, let's go!
Ah, wait, Itsuki-saaan!
(...What was that all about?)
